text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first scene is alive with the quiet intensity of collective learning—students in a bright room, heads bent, engaged in discussion or focused on the projected screen. I remain just outside, an observer separated by clear glass, aware of the boundary between participant and witness. In the second scene, the environment shifts to one of innovation and inquiry—colorful, bold lettering "R+D" announces a space shaped by research and development. There, the ideas displayed feel alive, inviting me to contemplate the connections between knowledge, creation, and discovery. I am simultaneously present and reflective, moving through realms of thought and invention.
